changeSet.author: aleksandar.jankovic

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE title LIKE 'Movie %'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO movies (title, description, year, genre, director, rating) SELECT 'Movie ' || i, 'Auto-generated movie number ' || i || ' created for load testing purposes.', 1950 + (i % 75), (ARRAY['Action','Comedy','Drama','Sci-Fi','Horror','Thriller','Romance','Crime','Animation','Documentary'])[(i % 10) + 1], 'Director ' || ((i % 200) + 1), ROUND((RANDOM() * 9 + 1)::NUMERIC, 1) FROM generate_series(1, 100000) AS s(i);
